summary: Issue #464 P2-9-2 partition progress store: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. AnalyticsBackfillPartitionsRepo exposes mark_complete, mark_failed, list_incomplete, is_complete; migration 019 adds analytics_backfill_partitions with unique (shop_id, bucket, date), RLS, token redaction on last_error. 4/4 unit tests pass (complete excluded, failed retryable, idempotent complete, token redaction). No Partner HTTP. AnalyticsPerformanceInterval columns not modified. No CRITICAL reliability/security/observability/performance gaps.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: Backfill model/repo API documented in database MODULE.md.
criticalFindings.suggestion: No action required — matches module authority pattern.

criticalFindings.description: Executor note: Alembic 019 down_revision=017 creates parallel head with #463 until rebase to 018_analytics_interval_backfill_cols after #463 merges.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Rebase down_revision on sync-before-merge per parallel-status merge order (#463 → #464).

criticalFindings.description: Executor note: list_incomplete returns explicit pending/failed rows only; unattempted dates have no row — orchestrator must use is_complete() or enumerate dates externally.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Document in orchestrator slice (#465+) when wiring backfill job.

mappings.criterion: Public repo API mark_complete mark_failed list_incomplete is_complete
completed partition not returned by list_incomplete
failed partition remains incomplete for retry
mark_failed redacts tokens pure persistence no partner http

recommendations: Rebase Alembic 019 down_revision to 018 after #463 merges before merge to main.
Wire list_incomplete + is_complete semantics in orchestrator when #465+ lands.
